title: LPC-Associate
bio: Nursel Coskuner is a LPC-Associate or LMSW practicing under the supervision of Dr. Manahil Riaz (LPC-Supervisor), serving clients from our Galleria and Woodlands offices. Nursel's primary areas of focus include Relationship/Attachment Issues, Identity Issues, and Depression. Nursel draws on evidence-based approaches such as Attachment-Based Therapy, Culturally Sensitive approaches, and EMDR, and works with preteens (11–12), teens (13–19), and adults (ages 20–64).
